recentTweets.text:
THANK YOU, Mr. President.

This is the honor of a lifetime. I will not let you or Georgia’s 14th District down.

Our work to put America first is just getting started! https://t.co/YjBsu2v0Rm

My latest article in The American Spectator.

If the U.S. is going to lower costs and revive the American dream, we need our elected leaders to think big. 
https://t.co/i1tURPLZvE
Let this Veteran's Day be a reminder to honor those who served our country in uniform every day. https://t.co/MVD9JA7gZS
@mattvanswol @JVER2ME Matt…please just move to my judicial circuit in NW Georgia.  Charlotte has lost its ever loving mind.
@CollinRugg These people are unbearable
@ShawnRyan762 Sir, you are welcome to move to Northwest Georgia!  We appreciate what you did and continue to fighting for those values!
IN THIS HOUSE HE’S A HALL OF FAMER

I prosecute fentanyl traffickers to the fullest extent of the law.

This isn’t San Francisco or New York City where Soros funded DA’s let criminals off easy.

If you traffic fentanyl in my backyard, I will make it my personal mission to lock you up. https://t.co/PxnbKCOf5O

Elon Musk is right, repeat violent offenders should be sentenced to the MAXIMUM amount of prison time.

Our justice system needs to be protecting law abiding citizens and prioritizing justice for victims — not coddling thugs who belong behind bars. https://t.co/MpoGBrsykh
@C__Herridge Should be the biggest scandal in the country!
@matt_vanswol @JamesPPinkerton 14 arrests is 13 too many https://t.co/12hDrOikO1

Yesterday the Senate unveiled Biden’s DOJ targeted an enemies list of nearly 200 Republicans, where is the media coverage?

I say this as a career prosecutor and District Attorney, someone needs to go to prison for this. https://t.co/O3nEur47qi

Democrats and political pundits can complain all they want, but President Trump has the Article 2 powers to authorize strikes in the Caribbean.

Fentanyl is the top killer for Americans 18-40, it’s refreshing to have a President doing something about it. https://t.co/pbMgRAhYcJ

As a 16 year prosecutor and elected District Attorney in Georgia, I find the lack of accountability for Jay Jones disturbing.

Jones should be facing potential disbarment, not running for Attorney General of Virginia. https://t.co/we9wCL6HqK

LaDarius Nollie came to Georgia to traffic fentanyl and now he will spend the next 5 years of his life in prison — I would have supported an even stronger sentence.

Thugs belong behind bars and I am proud to do my part as District Attorney. https://t.co/l1BMKvKjWj
@CollinRugg Stephen A. is criminally stupid!
Wow!  These are the actions I hope my kids grow up to do!
@elonmusk @elonmusk as a local elected DA and tough on crime…we need a counter movement to Soros.  How about Musk DAs?!?
@DisavowTrump20 Bye! https://t.co/dBOnAMyTfG
@jasonrantz Soros cities will have to learn the hard way…
@CollinRugg Bye bye, Ryan! https://t.co/QmOHvjV3lz
@thomaschattwill Bye…. https://t.co/o0q0ydCQRX

Decarlos Brown should have never been walking free.

If prosecutors and judges were doing their jobs to keep criminals off the streets in Charlotte, Iryna Zaruska would be alive today. https://t.co/XvSHYGLtaB
@ACTBrigitte I raise my hand!!! https://t.co/tIdSKmqtIu
She 100 percent yelled at someone not wearing a mask in 2022 and voted for Kamala
@WhiteHouse Aka GATOR GITMO!!!
Prayers for a great prosecutor!!!

One more criminal is locked up today thanks to a guilty verdict on all counts.

I don’t make soft plea deals with criminals, I go to trial and put them behind bars. https://t.co/LTp3vsjd4O

As an elected DA, it’s my job to use every resource at my disposal to keep Lookout Mountain safe.

I’m not some Soros prosecutor trying to bypass the law for criminals. I understand the only way to stop crime is to put in the work and lock the bad guys up. https://t.co/GEp2icNaAc

It’s been two years since the most famous mugshot in history was taken in Fulton County, Georgia.

Here’s my commentary from that day and boy did I call it!! https://t.co/3uafpbknYY
@GovPressOffice Are you going to cover the political party of the mayor and DA? https://t.co/6BImfb5GRv

@Chewiebow Happy to discuss and I’m sure the disconnect was unintentional.  We have a process for taking calls like this.  Are you in the Circuit to meet?  Ultimately this will be a matter investigated by the Sec of State’s office but happy to discuss with you.  If you go to our website

I say this as an elected District Attorney and Career Prosecutor.

Letitia James shouldn’t just be fired for this embarrassment and misuse of resources, she should face inquiry for disbarment. https://t.co/Vf68aO7ffE
Ladies and gentlemen, Democrats in 2025…
Accurate!

A kindergarten student in my Circuit competed in the Georgia Young Authors Competition and wrote about .@realDonaldTrump 

His teacher sent it to the White House and got this back!

Well done .@WhiteHouse and .@JDVance!

Maybe he’s a future occupant of 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue? https://t.co/zF56QT91V1
100 percent true lol
@WhiteHouse https://t.co/FAQo7DMIKt

If an active service member purposely leaked and mishandled classified information like Adam Schiff did, they would already be on their way to prison.

No one should be above the law, and that includes Adam Schiff. https://t.co/ImVr5dZbx9
This is a big deal if they go this route

As a District Attorney and career prosecutor, it's inspiring to see President Trump use every resource at his disposal to fight back against crime in DC.

Soros prosecutors have made our cities exponentially more dangerous, it's about time someone did something about it! https://t.co/RhbxUSZkmn

Evil walks among us every day. The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn’t exist — but this case proved otherwise.  Thank you to the Summerville Georgia Police Department for putting evil behind bars. #gapol https://t.co/MNUQjXatru
It is explained on page 1776 of Project 2025, @KeithOlbermann
@MarioNawfal He’s the first president in my lifetime that actually deserves the Nobel Peace prize
Take time today to honor the American heroes and military K9 of Extortion 17, lost 14 years ago in Afghanistan. Their courage and sacrifice will never be forgotten. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/CdBDx1BHDZ

This declassified email from Leonard Benardo is the clearest piece of evidence of a conspiracy that I have ever witnessed in my prosecutorial career.

Hillary Clinton must be dragged in front of Congress under oath immediately. https://t.co/nfOzJjNVco
@CBSNews https://t.co/QgJjV2Yazt

American icon Hulk Hogan has passed away at the age of 71.

This one hits hard. Hulkamania will never die.

Rest in Peace, king.

 https://t.co/ZRfL5Pj7QI

‘You have enemies? Good. That means you've stood up for something, sometime in your life.’ -Churchill 

Just outwork them! https://t.co/YQboRZ58DM

What does $40,000 in campaign funds from Soros-aligned groups get a community?

⬇️
Lincoln’s been brain dead for 160 years, so in a way he’s right…
@FoxNews Lincoln’s been brain dead for 160 years, so in a way he’s right…

What DNI Tulsi Gabbard has uncovered is bigger than Watergate.

As a career Prosecutor and elected District Attorney, here are my thoughts. https://t.co/GrlLL7cOjC
There needs to be a wholesale reckoning in the IC.  Sunlight immediately!

All we needed was a new president!  

Happy 6 month anniversary America!!! https://t.co/BMGQqpjSYh
Incredible work @aboehler and @SecRubio!

This is one of the most horrific stories targeting law enforcement officers in recent memory.

They should be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law, this has domestic terrorism written all over it!
https://t.co/ocyfsK9Thf

Today is a monumental day after a historic week for President Trump.

The One Big Beautiful Bill Act has passed, delivering his promises to the hardworking American people.

Prosperity, security, and opportunity for all -- that's what MAGA is about!

SO MUCH WINNING!!!
Is it too soon to discuss a third Trump term?
@BillMelugin_ @StephenM https://t.co/OK67uWmK7e

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.

The Export-Import Bank uses taxpayer dollars to back foreign business deals for large corporations like #Boeing.  Its current budget is $26 billion! Pelosi and her friends will tell you we can’t afford the wall, but we are spending $26 billion on corporate cronyism. #BuildTheWall
